{{CargoRelic
|name=Cold Fusion Reactor
|class_id=20372
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=A device developed through reverse-engineering with data from tactical records. It gains almost unlimited energy from the cold fusion reaction within. However, given that the energy from a single output is limited, it is often used on the power armor for individuals.
|fame=12
|art=16
|fth=17
|civ=14
|tech=31
|ss1=Per 10 Unknown Records read, Snail HP +10<br>Per 10 Unknown Records read, Snail ATK +1<br>Unknown Records Read: 400/400
|ss2=Per 10 Unknown Records read, Snail HP +20<br>Per 10 Unknown Records read, Snail ATK +2<br>Unknown Records Read: 400/400
|ss3=Per 10 Unknown Records read, Snail HP +30<br>Per 10 Unknown Records read, Snail ATK +3<br>Unknown Records Read: 400/400
|ss4=Per 10 Unknown Records read, Snail HP +30<br>Per 10 Unknown Records read, Snail ATK +3<br>Unknown Records Read: 400/400
|ss7=Per 10 Unknown Records read, Snail HP +30<br>Per 10 Unknown Records read, Snail ATK +3<br>Unknown Records Read: 400/400<br> (Awakened)
}}
